name: Copilot Studio Advanced
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Microsoft Copilot Studio
services.purpose: Low-code/no-code bot builder with generative answers, topic authoring, plugin extensibility, and multi-channel deployment

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for generative answers, custom plugin reasoning, complex dialog handling, and knowledge-grounded responses

enterprise.note: Provisioned throughput for high-volume enterprise bots

services.name: Microsoft Dataverse
services.purpose: Bot configuration, conversation logs, topic definitions, plugin metadata, and custom entity storage for bot knowledge

services.name: Microsoft Graph API
services.purpose: User profile resolution, Teams presence, SharePoint knowledge sources, Outlook calendar booking, and organizational directory

enterprise.note: Included with M365 license, metered connectors if needed

services.name: Azure AI Search
services.purpose: Knowledge base indexing for generative answers — SharePoint, web pages, custom data sources with semantic ranking

services.name: Azure Functions
services.purpose: Custom plugin backend — API connectors, business logic, data transformation, external system integration

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: OpenAI API keys, plugin API credentials, Graph client secrets, external connector tokens

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Bot analytics — conversation completion rates, plugin success/failure, generative answer quality, user satisfaction

optimization_tips: Use Copilot Studio's built-in generative answers for FAQ-style queries — only route complex multi-turn conversations to custom Azure OpenAI plugins
Leverage SharePoint as a knowledge source directly in Copilot Studio — avoids duplicating content into a separate AI Search index for common scenarios
Use GPT-4o-mini for simple plugin orchestration and entity extraction — reserve GPT-4o for complex reasoning that requires multi-step dialog
Implement conversation topic caching — frequently asked questions resolve from cached topics without invoking AI services
Monitor session consumption carefully — each user interaction counts as a session, so design topics to resolve in fewer turns
Use Azure Functions Consumption plan for low-traffic plugins — only upgrade to Premium when cold start latency impacts user experience
